scripts.ci: bun run validate:series && bun run typecheck && bun run build
scripts.dist: bun run build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.json --publish never
scripts.dist:linux: bun run build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.json --linux --publish never
scripts.dist:mac: bun run build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.json --mac --publish never
scripts.dist:win: bun run build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.json --win --publish never
scripts.release:linux: bun run build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.json --linux --publish always
scripts.release:mac: bun run build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.json --mac --publish always
scripts.release:win: bun run build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.json --win --publish always
